defects.claim: The most important geopolitical shift of the next 30 years was already visible in 2014 if you were willing to look at demographics and naval budgets instead of headlines.
defects.why: While the corpus references 2014 (Crimea invasion) and demographic/naval themes, it never makes the specific claim that the key geopolitical shift of the 'next 30 years' was visible in 2014 via demographics and naval budgets.
